title: Namaz on private property: Allahabad High Court orders protection for Muslim man threatened with bulldozer action
description: The Allahabad High Court on Wednesday ordered deployment of two security guards for the protection of one Haseen Khan, who claimed that he and others were restrained from offering namaz at his private property in Mohammad Ganj village [Tarik Khan v State of UP & 2 Others]The Division Bench of Justice Atul Sreedharan and Justice Siddharth Nandan also recorded Khan's statement that police had forced him to put his thumb impression on a paper without telling him about its contents.Khan had also
